props.ChoiceText: Rain, mud, and bad temper reduced noble distinction to who could still function.
props.ChoiceBio: Command in hard weather taught you how quickly the elements flatten hierarchy.

0.TransitionText: Because command in hard weather taught you how quickly the elements flatten hierarchy, responsibility gathered around you until service became command.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Officer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because command in hard weather taught you how quickly the elements flatten hierarchy, the matter only confirmed your place among the knightly.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Knight, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because command in hard weather taught you how quickly the elements flatten hierarchy, you were carried into the speed, rank, and danger of the cavalry.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Cavalry, but you may remain on your current path instead.
